name: Buttermilk Bran & Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine bran, flour, sugar, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, buttermilk, oil, and molasses.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened. Do not overmix.
4. Gently fold in blueberries (do not thaw if frozen).
5. Spoon batter into a nonstick or paper-lined muffin tin, filling nearly to the top.
6. Bake at 375°F for about 25 minutes or until firm to the touch.
7. Turn off the oven and let stand for 2 minutes before removing muffins from the tin.
Makes about 20-24 muffins.
